allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; print\(''=== dbond_s.train.shuffle.csv ===''\); print\(pd.read_csv\(''dataset/dbond_s.train.shuffle.csv''\).head\(3\)\); print\(''\\n=== dbond_m.train.shuffle.csv ===''\); print\(pd.read_csv\(''dataset/dbond_m.train.shuffle.csv''\).head\(3\)\); print\(''\\n=== dbond_s.test.csv ===''\); print\(pd.read_csv\(''dataset/dbond_s.test.csv''\).head\(3\)\); print\(''\\n=== dbond_m.test.csv ===''\); print\(pd.read_csv\(''dataset/dbond_m.test.csv''\).head\(3\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; print\(''=== dbond_s数据集列名 ===''\); df = pd.read_csv\(''dataset/dbond_s.train.shuffle.csv''\); print\(df.columns.tolist\(\)\); print\(f''\\n数据集大小: {len\(df\)} 行''\); print\(f''\\n数据类型:\\n{df.dtypes}''\); print\(''\\n=== dbond_m数据集列名 ===''\); df2 = pd.read_csv\(''dataset/dbond_m.train.shuffle.csv''\); print\(df2.columns.tolist\(\)\); print\(f''\\n数据集大小: {len\(df2\)} 行''\)")

Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; import os; files = [''dataset/dbond_s.train.shuffle.csv'', ''dataset/dbond_s.test.csv'', ''dataset/dbond_m.train.shuffle.csv'', ''dataset/dbond_m.test.csv'']; print\(''数据集统计信息:\\n''\); [print\(f''{f}: {len\(pd.read_csv\(f\)\)} 行''\) for f in files if os.path.exists\(f\)]")
